Boyd means the final overthrow of

Republican leaders are on the street
today attempting to carry out the
bluff which Prosecuting Attorney
kimball is said to have made against
lower Howard street-that all gam
bling houses will be closed tightly I'M
les sthe sporting element and saloon
men get in line for Colonel Boyd. The
latest method is for the leaders to
walk along the street and repeat the
declaration that people in the lower
part of town will suffer unless every
body lines up for Mr.. Boyd.


Nearly all unions in the city have
reported as being solid for Mayor
Byrne. labor men realizing that each
of the other candidates either are
members of the Commercial club or
are being backed by the club mem
bers.


The successful efforts of BUSINESS
Agent Quinn of the trades council.
who is chairman of the Byrne central
committee. in settling the liverymen's
and brewery workers strikes today
is regarded as conclusive vindication
of the charge that Byrne supporters
have any other object in view than
to preserve the industrial peace of the
city. as has been the policy of Mayor
Byrne's administration.


Superintendent of Streets Joe
Daniel, who is working . hard for
Rasher. has been promised. it is ru-
mored. an appointment as city COM
missioner.
